description_long: This hammer features a stylized, polygonal design with a predominantly white and light gray head adorned with bright green, vine-like patterns on its sides and striking face. The head is hexagonal and blocky, with a large, flat striking surface and a slightly tapered rear. The handle is long, slender, and brown, resembling wood, and is attached centrally to the head. The hammer's side panels are decorated with matching green motifs, giving it a decorative, almost fantasy-like appearance. The overall construction appears solid, with no visible fasteners or separable parts. The hammer is clean and pristine, with no signs of wear or damage.
description: A stylized white and gray hammer with green vine patterns and a long brown handle, featuring a hexagonal, blocky head.
description_view_0: Side view showing the green vine patterns on the head and side panel, with the brown handle extending downward.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the flat striking face with a central green motif and the symmetrical, hexagonal shape of the head.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying similar green patterns and the full length of the handle.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the tapered back of the head and the alignment of the handle with the head's center.
attribute_handle_type: curved wooden handle, smooth surface, no visible grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: blocky, hexagonal sledge-type head with flat striking face and decorative side panels
